title: FreePBX security advisory (AV26–474)
description: On May 15, 2026, FreePBX published a security advisory to address a critical vulnerability in the following products:
products: FreePBX Security-Reporting userman (FreePBX 16)  versions 16.0.45 and prior
FreePBX Security-Reporting userman (FreePBX 17)  versions 17.0.7 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
